title: 聽日要出嚟嘅手足，希望你哋睇到下面嘅宣言

replies.msg:
聽日要出嚟嘅手足，希望你哋睇到下面嘅宣言，希望到時香港會有人讀出嚟。

萬事小心，我哋係背後支持你哋

一群來自台灣、澳洲、加拿大、美國、日本、北歐的流亡手足上


《成立香港共和國臨時政府宣言》 （527宣言）

2019年6月9日，民陣號召「守護香港反送中」大遊行，一百萬人走上街頭，要求政府撤回引渡條例，惜林鄭政府漠視民意，宣佈6月12日繼續進行二讀，以強硬姿態推行引渡條例，引致6月12日香港市民發生激烈抗爭。香港警察以暴力手段對待示威者，甚至犯下各種反人道罪行，更激發起香港人爭取民主的決心。及後，至2019年7月1日，示威者以佔領立法會方式展示對政權的不滿，以及宣讀佔領宣言，包括主張不排除成立臨時政府。在721 包圍中聯辦再次出現臨時政府宣言，主張成立臨時立法會。

中共一直以來對牆內人民宣稱示威者為暴徒，破壞社會安寧，然而香港人最初只要求答應有關五大訴求。唯港共政府一直漠視民意，以警察不停武力打壓香港人，和平示威卻以「非法集結」罪名拘捕，更有不少手足面對著「暴動」、「縱火」等罪名。面對以年計算的刑期，眾多香港示威者不得不離開家園，流亡海外。

港共政府最近更以「外間法律意見」以及由梁君彥欽點，強行助李慧瓊登上內會主席，嚴重破壞議會制度，令香港立法會失去認受性。此外，中國再強推「國歌法」、「國安法」，令香港正式與「一國兩制」告別，此時港共政府在香港人心中的認受性已然歸零。

我們不得不承認香港只有獨立建國才會有出路。

今日，我們在此宣布香港臨時政府正式成立。
但礙於臨時政府在港共政權土地下暫時無法運作，
因此海外流亡手足會繼續籌備及營運直至香港建國，
海外手足流亡政府稍後會盡快舉行公投以及籌備海外建軍。

「民族自強，香港獨立」

Tg channel: @hkgovinexile

Declaration of the establishment of the provisional government of Republic of Hong Kong

On 9th June 2019, the Civil Human Right called out a "protection against Hong Kong", which one million Hongkongers marched onto the streets asking the government to withdraw the extradition bill. Unfortunately, Carrie Lam’s government ignored the public opinion and announced that Legco would continue the second reading on 12th June. The implementation of the extradition bill with a tough attitude led to fierce protests among Hong Kong citizens on 12th June. The Hong Kong police treated the protesters in brutality and even committed various anti-human crimes, which further inspired the determination of Hong Kong people to fight for democracy. Afterwards, on 1st July 2019, protesters occupied Legislative Council to show their dissatisfaction with the regime and read the Occupation Declaration, which included advocating the establishment of an interim government. In 21st July, surrounded by the Liaison Office, the interim government declaration appeared again, advocating the establishment of an interim legislative council.

The CCP has always claimed to the people inside the wall that our protesters are thugs, which is also destructing the society. In fact, what Hong Kong people want at the beginning is to only promise our five major demands. However, the Hong Kong communist government has been suppressing Hong Kong people with police, and peaceful protesters have been arrested based on illegal assembly. Moreover, they have not faced offences such as arson and riots. Many Hong Kong protesters forced to leave their homes and go into exile.

The Hong Kong Communist Government has recently adopted "legal opinions from outside " and hand-picked by Leung Kwan-yuen. Forcibly helping Li Huiqiong to become chairman of the internal council seriously damaged the parliamentary system and made the Hong Kong Legislative Council unacceptable. Besides, China has pushed the establishment of National Anthem Law and the National Security Law to make Hong Kong formally realized the end of one country, two systems. At this time, the acceptance of the Hong Kong Communist government in the hearts of Hong Kong people is zero.

We have to admit that Hong Kong will only have a way out if it is being an independent country. Today, we here announce the official establishment of the Hong Kong Provisional Government.

However, due to the provisional government's has a temporary inability to operate under the land of the Hong Kong Communist regime. Therefore, the protesters in exile overseas will continue to prepare and operate until the national founding of Hong Kong. The provisional government will hold a referendum and build overseas troops as soon as possible

National self-reliance, Hong Kong independence.
